ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the measurement */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key reference to the date */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key reference to the time */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key reference to the site */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., CO2 concentration, temperature, PM2.5) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ppm, °C, µg/m³) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement site */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Additional weather conditions at the time of measurement (e.g., wind speed, humidity) */,
  "big_volumes" TEXT /* Array of big volume measurement values */,
  "big_volumes_mv" TEXT /* Array of big volume measurement values for moving average */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES times ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_date_id FOREIGN KEY ("date_id") REFERENCES dates ("date_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the date */,
  "date_value" TEXT /* The actual date value */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the date */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the date */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the time */,
  "time_value" TEXT /* The actual time value */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the time */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the time */,
  "second" INTEGER /* Second of the time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the monitoring site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the site */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the site was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Affiliated institution of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality assessment */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being evaluated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the measurement */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision of the measurement */,
  "validity" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measurement is valid */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used for the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
